titleStmt.title: SII 27.62: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 62. (A.R. No. 334 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Śaṁkaranārāyaṇa temple in the hamlet of Śāstān.

This record registers a gift of money-income of some villages (named), by mahāpradhāna Jakkaṇṇa-oḍeya the governor of Bārakūrurājya to Śiva-Niḍuṁbura as the latter's father died in course of his official duties. The gift was made at the instance of the king as also Muddeya-daṇāyaka in the presence of Malle-oḍeya of Honnāvura.
It is dated Śaka 1305, Rudhirōdgāri, Jyēshṭha śu. 8, Sunday corresponding to 1383 A.D., May 10.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śakavaruśa 1305 rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭa su 8 Ā
lu śrīmanu mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirā
ya vibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pūrvva dakṣiṇa pa
ścima samudrādhipati śrī vīra harihara mahārāyanu rājya
va . pratipālisuvalli Ā hariyappavoḍoyara nirūpadiṁ
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ jakkaṁṇa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu prati
pālisuvalli Ā jakkaṁṇa Oḍeyaru śivaniḍuṁburarige naḍasi koṭṭa śi
lāśāsana kramaveṁteṁdaḍe rājakāriya nimittavāgi Aṁṇani
ḍuṁburaru svargastharādali Ātanamaga śivaniḍuṁbūrarige janana ma
ḍa linali Ā harihararāyana muddeyadaṇāyakara nirūpadi
ṁ hoṁnāurada male Oḍeyara samakṣadalu Aniḍuṁburarige
Ā caṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi Eṟadukoṭṭa vijamu
garu prākuḷa kāṭiga 594 . ge naṁjaṁṇa māḍisida kelliṁge
ṟeya chatrakke kāṭiga 449 suddhaga 550 vinagrāma 1 ye
ḷuḍaṁpaḷi prakukuḷa kāṭiga 357Þ1 . dagrāma 1 kuttuhā
ḍiya haravari prāku kuḷakāṭiga 250 ṟa haravari 1
Aṁttuprāku 6 ga 1157 . ¢ da grāma Eraḍu haravari Oṁ
daṟa Aramaneya kuḷavakaḍidu Asivaniḍuṁburarige Alli E
nu Uḷḷaṁthādellavanū sarvvamāṁnyavāgi Eṟadukoṭṭu
naḍasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanastāna māṁnya pūrvva mariyāde Ura
Upacāra ga 28 madhyastaṁge ga 12 Uḍipina dēvara kāhu ga 5 maḍi
yadēvara kāhu ga 5 Aṁtu Ayivattu hoṁnan ga 500 . vanu naḍasi koṁbaru
Aḷavu Aṁnyāyadalu koḷasalaru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā
śaṣṭirvvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi yi śilā śāsanakke jakkaṁ
ṇa Oḍeyara suhastada Oppa jakkaṁṇana baraha A vijamugurada
Ūru Oṁṭuprajeya suhastada Oppa śrīkruṣṇadēvaru gōḷiya brahma
dēvaru
Digital edition of SII 27.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
